instruction:
Complete a verifiable city sunset skyline enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/pexels-houwng-nguyen-3756130-32529063.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sky_Purple' above the background. Use the Free Select tool to select the sky area (top 60% of the image). Apply Hue-Saturation adjustment: increase Purple saturation by exactly +30 to enhance the twilight sky colors.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Building_Gold' above 'Sky_Purple'. Use the Hue-Saturation adjustment on the building areas: increase Yellow saturation by exactly +35 to make the golden reflections more vibrant.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Rainbow_Enhance' above 'Building_Gold'. Use the Color Balance adjustment on the rainbow arc area: add +20 to Red channel and +15 to Blue channel to make the rainbow more visible.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Contrast_Boost' above 'Rainbow_Enhance'. Use the Curves adjustment: create an S-curve to increase overall contrast by 22%, making the buildings stand out against the sky.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 70% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 90px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 25% opacity.

6. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'CITY OF GOLD'
   - Font size: 38px
   - Color: #ffd700 (gold)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 30px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Time' at the bottom-right corner with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'SUNSET'
   - Font size: 24px
   - Color: #ff69b4 (hot pink)
   - Position: 25px from right edge, 25px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Time'

8. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 8px solid color #4b0082 (indigo) to create a border around the entire image.

9. Export the final image as 'city_sunset.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1400 pixels (height auto), quality 94. Save the project as 'city_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.
